headline: Trane Technologies Targets Building Efficiency And AI Data Center Cooling Growth
summary: Trane Technologies (NYSE:TT) advanced in the U.S. Department of Energy’s Commercial Building HVAC Technology Challenge, with its heat pump solutions moving into real-world field trials after exceeding efficiency requirements. The company expanded its work with NVIDIA on thermal management for large AI data centers, updating reference designs to support higher power density and complex computing loads. Trane Technologies focuses on heating, ventilation, air conditioning and refrigeration...
